form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Flemington in the G1 All-Star Mile on March 7 over 1600m, 0.6 len behind Tom Kitten with 57kg at $2.35. Second run from a spell tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 12 at Flemington in the G1 Aust Cup on March 28 over 2000m, slow going nose behind Light Infantry Man carrying 57kg at $11. Fitter now and making headway. Comes off a gut buster second-up and back to the mile, place best.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Tough miler with her mojo back, top-three contender.
